---
title: "CV"
---

You can download my full CV as a PDF below.

[<a href="academicCV.pdf" class="btn btn-primary" style="background:#2c2c2c;border-color:#2c2c2c;font-family:Georgia;font-size:0.9rem;">⬇ Download CV (PDF)</a>]{.download-btn}

---

::: {.section-title}
Education
:::

```{=html}
<p>
  <strong>Ph.D. in Psychological &amp; Quantitative Foundations</strong> <em>(expected May 2026)</em><br>
  University of Iowa, Iowa City, USA<br>
  Dissertation: <em>"In Progress"</em><br>
  Committee: Ariel Aloe, TBD, TBD, TBD
</p>

<p>
  <strong>M.A. in Psychological &amp; Quantitative Foundations</strong> (December 2025)<br>
  University of Iowa, Iowa City, USA<br>
  Thesis: <em>"Conflated Random Slopes in Multilevel Analysis"</em><br>
  Committee: Lesa Hoffman, Jonathan Templin, Ariel Aloe
</p>

<p>
  <strong>Bachelor of Social Work</strong> (March 2018)<br>
  Universidad del Bío-Bío, Concepción, Chile
</p>
```

::: {.section-title}
Professional Experience
:::

```{=html}
<p>
  <strong>Graduate Research Assistant</strong> (2024–2026)<br>
  Gender stereotypes and career vocation among students in USA, research project by Dr. Rong Su<br>
  Tippie Business College, University of Iowa, USA
</p>

<p>
  <strong>Graduate Teaching Assistant</strong> (2022–2025)<br>
  Advanced quantitative methods courses, University of Iowa, USA<br>
  PSQF 6246: Design of Experiments · PSQF 6249: Factor Analysis and SEM · PSQF 6270: Generalized Linear Models · PSQF 6271: Longitudinal Multilevel Models · PSQF 7375: Bayesian Psychometric Modeling · PSQF 6272: Clustered Multilevel Analysis
</p>

<p>
  <strong>Researcher &amp; Lecturer</strong> (2018–2021)<br>
  Researcher at Centro de Investigación Educativa CIDCIE, Universidad del Bio-Bio, Chile<br>
  Lecturer in Quantitative Data Analysis Techniques and Quantitative Data Collection Techniques, Universidad del Bio-Bio, Chile
</p>
```

::: {.section-title}
Publications
:::

See the [Publications](publications.qmd) page.

::: {.section-title}
Teaching Experience
:::

See the [Teaching](teaching.qmd) page.

::: {.section-title}
Awards & Fellowships
:::

- **Outstanding Teaching Assistant Award** · University of Iowa · 2025
- **T. Anne Cleary Psychological Research Scholarship** · University of Iowa · 2024
- **Blommers-Hieronymus-Feldt Fellowship** · College of Education, University of Iowa · 2023
- **Equal Opportunities Scholarship (BIO)** · Fulbright Commission & ANID, Chile · 2018
- **Universidad del Bio-Bio Award** · Universidad del Bio-Bio · 2018

::: {.section-title}
Conference Presentations
:::

**2025**

- Padilla, B., & Hoffman, L. (October). *Conflated random slopes in multilevel analysis.* Poster presentation at the annual meeting of the Society for Multivariate Experimental Psychology (SMEP), South Bend, Indiana.
- Padilla, B., & Hoffman, L. (July). *Avoiding conflated random slopes in multilevel analysis.* Poster presentation at the annual meeting of the Psychometric Society (IMPS), Minneapolis, Minnesota.
- Su, R., Padilla, B., & Lowery, N. (July). *The influence of societal gender equality on career interest gender gaps.* Presentation at the annual meeting of the Academy of Management (AOM), Copenhagen, Denmark.

::: {.section-title}
Software
:::

**R/RStudio** (advanced) · **STATA** (intermediate) · **Mplus** (intermediate)
